label: FACIS Simulation — Modbus Adapter
info:
FACIS Simulation — Modbus TCP Slave Adapter

Exposes the latest energy-meter snapshot as Janitza UMG 96RM-shaped
Modbus TCP holding registers on port 502.

Register layout preserved from src/simulators/energy_meter/register_map.py:
  19000-19006 active power L1/L2/L3/total (W)
  19020-19024 voltage L1-N/L2-N/L3-N (V)
  19040-19044 current L1/L2/L3 (A)
  19060      power factor (-)
  19062      total active energy (kWh)
  19064      frequency (Hz)

All values are IEEE 754 float32 in big-endian register pairs.
FC 3 (Read Holding Registers) and FC 4 (Read Input Registers) both
resolve to the same data block.

Multi-meter MVP: one modbus-server node per meter, distinguished by
unit ID. Configure additional meters by duplicating the writer function
+ modbus-server pair and pointing each at a different `latest_meters[i]`.

name: build register block
Janitza UMG 96RM holding registers, IEEE 754 big-endian
info:
Updates the modbus-server's data block whenever the Feeds tab
emits a new envelope (link-in `sim.envelope`). The 1-second inject node
is a safety net so the server stays current even if the engine is
paused.

For multi-meter exposure: duplicate the writer function and the
modbus-server config and point each at a different `METER_INDEX`.
